history.title: About Netbet Casino
history.description1: What makes us stand out is that we boost gameplay not with one offer, but with a full ecosystem of daily deals, seasonal campaigns, and special rewards. Our casino gives you more value from every deposit, more ways to play, and more chances to chase standout wins.
history.description2: Our casino is built for players who want the most from a modern online gaming experience. We bring together popular slots, table games, live casino titles, and themed game collections in one convenient space. Here, it is easy to enjoy both quick gaming sessions and longer evenings packed with live dealers and bonus features.
history.description3: We constantly refresh the lobby and add new releases so there is always something new to discover. We place special focus on promotions because we believe gaming should deliver not only excitement, but extra value as well. That is why we offer a welcome bonus, daily deals, monthly specials, and prize-driven campaigns. Throughout the week, players can unlock free spins, deposit bonuses, and special game-based offers through our Daily Deals. Throughout the month, we run themed events, mini-games, Drops & Prizes campaigns, and seasonal promotions that make every visit feel more dynamic. We also support prize-draw formats where accumulated rewards can lead to additional benefits. Our rewards system is built around NetPoints, earned from real-money play in the casino and live sections. These points unlock access to the Club Shop, where you can choose bonuses, free spins, cash vouchers, gifts, and prize draw tickets. As your activity grows, your player status rises, and with it come stronger privileges and faster point accumulation through NetPoints Boost. This structure turns every session into part of a broader rewards journey. We also keep entertainment convenient with intuitive navigation, mobile-friendly play, and quick access to favorite categories. At the same time, we focus on atmosphere by offering classic card tables alongside modern live shows that recreate the feeling of a real casino floor. In the end, we create more than just a place to play for wins; we create a complete gaming ecosystem with bonuses, events, entertainment, and constant reasons to come back for more.

customHtml.title: Netbet Casino: your comfort — rules, security, support
customHtml.description:
Rules for Access and Responsible Play at Our Casino

At our casino, we do everything possible to keep gaming fair, safe, and comfortable for every player. Only adult users may access our platform for real-money play after completing registration and, when required, verification checks. We use identity and age verification to protect players, payment transactions, and account access. To enjoy a smooth experience, players should provide accurate details during registration and use only their own payment methods. We operate on a one-account-per-player principle to maintain transparency across bonuses and financial activity. We welcome active play while expecting fair conduct and compliance with platform rules. Bonus abuse, the use of third-party payment details, attempts to bypass system restrictions, and the creation of multiple accounts are not permitted. We also take responsible gaming seriously and provide tools that help players stay in control. Every game session and every promotional offer is governed by its own applicable terms. Before activating bonuses or requesting a payout, we encourage players to review the current conditions for the smoothest possible experience. Our goal is to create an environment where safety, transparency, and enjoyment work together.


Main Access Conditions

  • • Only adult players may register and play with real money.
  • • We may request documents to verify identity, age, and payment ownership.
  • • Players must use only their own account and their own payment methods.
  • • Personal information in the account must remain accurate and up to date.

Prohibited Actions

  • • Creating more than one account for the same person is not allowed.
  • • Using cards or wallets that do not belong to the account holder is not allowed.
  • • Abusing promotions, bonuses, technical features, or gameplay mechanics is prohibited.
  • • Sharing account access with third parties is prohibited.

Responsible Gaming

  • • We support deposit limits and personal gaming control settings.
  • • We offer timeout and self-restriction tools for better control.
  • • We encourage gaming as entertainment, not as a financial solution.
  • • We recommend regular breaks and mindful time management while playing.

Licensing, Data Protection, Encryption, and Privacy at Our Casino

At our casino, security stands at the heart of the entire gaming experience. We operate in line with strong industry standards and follow strict requirements related to transparency, player protection, and payment integrity. For us, licensing is not just a formal requirement; it reflects a regulated approach to gameplay, financial operations, and platform management. That is why we place major emphasis on account controls, verification procedures, and the resilience of our digital infrastructure. This approach helps us maintain a stable, secure, and clearly structured gaming environment.


We use modern data protection methods to keep player information secure at every stage of the customer journey. Sensitive personal data is handled through protected servers, while our infrastructure is regularly updated with current security patches. We treat cyber protection as an ongoing process, which is why monitoring, updates, and technical controls form part of our daily operation. Every login, every deposit, and every withdrawal request is processed within a protected digital environment. This strengthens trust and allows players to focus on enjoying the platform.


Encryption and enhanced transaction authentication play a key role in our payment security framework. When making deposits through cards or e-wallets, players may be asked to complete an additional verification step designed to strengthen account protection. Depending on the payment method, this can involve a one-time code, SMS confirmation, email confirmation, banking app approval, biometric identification, or similar authentication tools. This reduces the risk of unauthorized transactions and helps confirm that the action is being made by the true payment owner. We believe strong payment protection is essential for a reliable gaming service.


Our privacy policy is built around transparent and responsible handling of user information. We collect and use data only to the extent necessary for account management, payment processing, verification requirements, and service improvement. We also provide clear controls related to communications and marketing preferences so that players can manage how they are contacted. For us, privacy is not only a legal document; it is a practical commitment to respecting player data. That is why we combine legal clarity with strong technical safeguards.


An additional layer of protection is provided through account verification procedures. When necessary, we may request proof of identity, age, address, and payment ownership. This helps us safeguard accounts against fraud, prevent underage access, and ensure payouts reach the correct recipient. Verification also makes the withdrawal process more secure and transparent by confirming the rightful account holder. In this way, convenience and security reinforce each other across the platform.


We also connect data security with responsible gaming principles. It is important for us not only to store information securely, but also to use it in ways that support proper user identification, age controls, and dependable access to self-management tools. This integrated approach combines licensing, encryption, verification, privacy, and responsible practices into one complete protection system. As a result, players receive more than access to games; they gain confidence that their account, personal data, and financial activity are being safeguarded. This is how we build trust in our platform every day.


Deposits and Withdrawals at Our Casino

At our casino, we make financial transactions simple, fast, and secure. We support popular bank cards, e-wallets, and bank transfer solutions so every player can choose a familiar payment method. Deposits are processed within a protected payment environment with additional confirmation layers whenever required by the bank or provider. Funding your account may involve strong authentication such as one-time passcodes, banking app approval, or biometric confirmation. This improves security and helps protect your balance from unauthorized activity. Withdrawals are generally returned through the same method used for the deposit, adding another layer of control and transparency. Once a request is submitted, we carry out an internal review, and when no additional documents are needed, approval typically takes from a few hours up to 15 hours. After approval, the final timing depends on the selected payout method. E-wallets usually arrive the fastest, cards take longer, and bank transfers generally require the most processing time. We also keep the cashier flow straightforward so you can choose the method, amount, and confirmation steps in just a few clicks. When needed, we may request verification documents to keep the full payment journey even more secure. This approach allows us to combine payout speed, fund protection, and player convenience in one balanced payment experience.


Method Deposit Speed Payout After Approval
Visa / Master Card Instant Up to 4 working days
Skrill Instant Up to 24 hours
NETE LLER Instant Up to 24 hours
Payz Instant 2 to 24 hours
Apple Pay Instant 24 to 48 hours
Trustly Instant 2 to 24 hours
Bank Transfer Depends on bank Up to 8 working days

Minimums and Limits

  • • Minimum withdrawal amount starts from 10.
  • • Card withdrawals can reach up to 40,000.
  • • Skrill, NETELLER, Payz, Trustly, Apple Pay, and bank transfer withdrawals can reach up to 10,000.
  • • my paysafecard withdrawals can reach up to 1,000.
  • • Final available limits may vary depending on the chosen method and account verification status.

Customer Support at Our Casino

At our casino, we aim to provide help quickly, clearly, and effectively. Our support system is designed so players can get answers through the most convenient channel without unnecessary waiting. Live chat is the main option for fast questions about bonuses, payments, verification, and gameplay. For more detailed cases, we offer email support, which is especially useful when documents, screenshots, or full explanations need to be attached. We also structure communication so that more complex requests can be directed to the right team without delay. For general questions, players can often receive assistance almost immediately through live chat. For ticket and email requests, we aim to respond within 24 hours. This format allows us to combine speed with service quality. We focus not only on response time, but also on delivering precise guidance so players clearly understand the next steps. Help features and parts of the support journey are available through localized platform versions, while our core support is built for a smooth international experience. If the issue relates to accessibility, navigation, or usability, we also provide dedicated support options for those needs. Our goal is to make sure every player feels supported from registration to withdrawal.


Contact Channels

  • • Live chat for fast questions about games, bonuses, payments, and account matters.
  • • Email support for cases that require documents, confirmations, or detailed explanations.
  • • Contact request forms for routing issues to the right internal team.
  • • Additional service channels for accessibility-related support needs.

Response Time and Service Quality

  • • Live chat is designed for very fast first-line assistance.
  • • Ticket and email requests are generally handled within 24 hours.
  • • Support assists with registration, verification, bonuses, deposits, withdrawals, and technical issues.
  • • We aim to provide practical solutions and clear next steps, not generic replies.

Language Availability

  • • Core support is structured for a smooth international player experience.
  • • Help and navigation are available in English and through localized interface versions.
  • • We prioritize clarity so players can quickly find the right information.
  • • Support is built to assist both new players and regular members throughout the entire journey.

customHtml_2.title: Entertainment and Gaming at Netbet Casino
customHtml_2.description:
Players Club Loyalty Program and NetPoints Rewards

At our casino, the loyalty program is designed so that every gaming session brings not only excitement, but meaningful extra value as well. We award NetPoints for real-money play in the casino and live sections, which means activity turns directly into rewards. Players begin participating in the system as soon as they register and start playing for real money, without complicated steps or extra fees. As points build up, access opens to the Club Shop, where rewards can be exchanged for free spins, bonuses, cash vouchers, prize draw tickets, and a range of gifts. This makes our reward structure flexible and player-friendly because each member can choose the type of benefit that suits them best. We further strengthen the value of the program through NetPoints Boost, which can increase point accumulation by up to 5.5x. This is especially useful for active players who want to progress faster and unlock rewards more often. Player Status is calculated automatically based on clear NetPoints earned from real-money gameplay. Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond follow a monthly renewal cycle, while Platinum and Stellar benefit from an extended six-month maintenance window. Once Elite is reached, the status becomes permanent, making the top tier especially prestigious. We also keep the spendable NetPoints balance separate from Player Status progress, so members can use their points in the Club Shop while still moving forward through the tiers. In the My Club section, players can always track current performance, accumulated points, and the distance to the next status. This makes our loyalty system transparent, simple to follow, and genuinely motivating.


Registration Conditions

  • • Register an account and play with real money in the casino and live sections.
  • • NetPoints start accumulating from the very first real-money wager.
  • • Club participation is automatic and does not require a separate paid subscription.
  • • Points are tracked in real time and progress can be monitored in the My Club area.

Levels and How to Reach Them

  • • Bronze — the first status level unlocked after reaching the required amount of clear NetPoints within the qualifying period.
  • • Silver — the next level for players with stronger regular activity.
  • • Gold — a status for consistent and clearly established real-money play.
  • • Diamond — a higher tier with stronger club value and progression benefits.
  • • Platinum — a premium tier with an extended 6-month maintenance framework.
  • • Stellar — an advanced status for highly active players with long-term progression value.
  • • Elite — the permanent top tier that remains with the player once achieved.

Bonuses and Rewards Available

  • • NetPoints Boost up to 5.5x — faster point earning and quicker movement through the club structure.
  • • Club Shop rewards — exchange points for bonuses, free spins, and cash vouchers.
  • • Prize draw tickets — use points for entry into extra reward draws.
  • • Monthly raffle opportunities — additional chances to compete for value-packed prizes.
  • • Surprise gifts — access special reward items and promotional extras in the shop.
  • • Stronger status value — the higher the tier, the more rewarding each gaming session becomes.

Bonuses, Winning Opportunities, Special Offers, and Gaming Events

At our casino, the promotional system goes far beyond a simple sign-up offer and extends into a wide range of ongoing player benefits. We begin with a 100% welcome bonus on the first deposit plus 10 free spins, giving new players a stronger start and more room to explore. After that, our daily offers keep the momentum going with added value across different types of gameplay. Through our Daily Deals, we regularly launch free spin offers, special play mechanics, and deposit-linked promotions. One standout example is Friday Happy Hour, where players can receive a 50% deposit bonus and increase their playing power. On selected days, we also feature promotions such as Spin Generator and similar slot-focused mechanics that make sessions even more exciting. Our Monthly Specials add another layer of value through rotating campaigns that may include free spins, featured slot collections, themed providers, and Drops & Prizes mechanics. These promotions create extra excitement and increase the reward potential during everyday play. We also run themed seasonal events throughout the year, tailored to festive periods and special occasions. In these campaigns, players can join prize draws, reward hunts, and limited-time offers. We also support prize-led promotional formats where members can compete for cash rewards, gifts, and bonus opportunities. Across our campaigns, players may encounter prize bundles, gadgets, holidays, and major cash-style rewards. Our offer system covers both slots and selected game categories, making it easy to choose promotions that match different play styles. We also keep activation straightforward: some offers use a code, some require opt-in inside the account, and others activate through participation in selected games. This makes our promotional environment dynamic, varied, and highly rewarding. As a result, every visit comes with more than one way to increase the value of the gaming session.


Key Bonuses and Special Offers

  • • 100% Welcome Bonus + 10 Free Spins — a strong first-deposit package that doubles the opening bankroll and adds extra slot play.
  • • Friday Happy Hour 50% — a weekly deposit bonus designed to give players more value on a favorite gaming day.
  • • Wednesday Spin Generator — a free-spin focused promotion that enhances slot sessions during selected periods.
  • • Daily Deals — changing day-by-day rewards that bring fresh promotional value throughout the week.
  • • Monthly Specials — rotating monthly campaigns featuring bonuses, free spins, and selected-game mechanics.
  • • Drops & Prizes campaigns — reward-driven promotional events that add more winning potential during eligible play.
  • • Seasonal events — festive and themed promotions with limited-time rewards and special gaming tasks.
  • • Prize draws — additional opportunities to compete for cash rewards, gifts, and high-value prizes.
  • • Monthly prize opportunities up to 5,000 — selected reward formats can include prize potential reaching up to 5,000.
  • • Game-linked offers — targeted promotions connected to specific slots, providers, or featured game collections.

Games Available at Our Casino

At our casino, we offer a complete game collection built for different styles and pacing preferences. The core of the lobby is made up of slots, featuring everything from classic machines to modern video slots with bonus rounds, free spins, multipliers, and advanced features. We regularly expand the slot section with new releases, popular titles, and themed collections so the selection always feels fresh and varied. For players who enjoy card-based classics, we offer blackjack, baccarat, poker-style games, and other table-driven formats. We also provide roulette in multiple versions, including fast tables, classic layouts, and live options. For players who want the atmosphere of a real casino floor, our live casino brings real dealers and streamed tables directly to the screen. In the live section, players can enjoy roulette, blackjack, baccarat, and popular game-show formats such as Monopoly and Deal or No Deal. Our catalog also includes jackpot slots, Megaways titles, and first person games for players who prefer a faster digital pace. We support demo play for selected titles so players can get familiar with mechanics before switching into full play. Thanks to mobile optimization, the main categories run smoothly on smartphones and tablets. We place strong emphasis on variety, which makes it easy to move between slots, live tables, card games, and fresh releases. As a result, every player can build a personal entertainment route here, from quick spins to full live casino sessions.


Main Game Categories

  • • Slots — classic machines, video slots, bonus features, free spins, Megaways, and jackpot titles.
  • • Live Casino — real-dealer tables with authentic casino atmosphere and streamed gameplay.
  • • Roulette — European roulette, classic variants, quick tables, and live roulette.
  • • Blackjack — classic and multi-format versions, including popular variants and selected demo access.
  • • Baccarat — a smooth card classic for players who enjoy simple structure and strong pacing.
  • • Card Games — poker-style games, blackjack, baccarat, and more card-based titles.
  • • First Person Games — fast digital table-game versions with intuitive control.
  • • Game Shows — entertainment-led live formats with high-energy presentation.
  • • New Games — a dedicated section for fresh releases and new mechanics.
  • • NetBet Selection — featured games and curated platform favorites chosen for players.

Minimum and Maximum Bets at Our Casino

At our casino, betting ranges vary depending on the specific game, provider, and play format. We support both low-entry stakes for relaxed sessions and higher limits for players who prefer a wider playing range. Below is a practical overview of popular categories to help players understand the general betting structure and choose a comfortable format. Exact limits are always displayed inside each selected game before the bet is confirmed.


Game Type Min Bet Max Bet
Slots From 0.10 Varies by title
Roulette From 0.10 Varies by table
Blackjack From 1.00 Varies by version
Baccarat From 1.00 Varies by table
Live Casino From 0.10–1.00 Varies by dealer table
Jackpot Slots From 0.10 Varies by title

Tournaments and Leaderboards: How to Join and Win

At our casino, tournaments and leaderboards add another layer of excitement because every gaming session can contribute not only to direct wins, but also to a stronger position in the prize race. We run promotional campaigns and special game events where participation is usually opened through selected slots, themed collections, or featured monthly promotions. Depending on the event, points may be awarded for qualifying bets, the number of spins, completion of promotional tasks, or performance within a defined time window. In some tournaments, stake size matters more, while in others the focus is on activity volume or progress through a special promotion mechanic. We always present the rules of each event before participation begins so players understand exactly how leaderboard positions are calculated. Progress can usually be tracked directly through the promotion card, the account area, or the dedicated promo section. As activity increases, players can climb higher in the rankings and improve their prize potential. Once the event ends, prizes are generally credited automatically or made available after results are confirmed. In some cases, standard account verification may be required before a larger reward is released. We encourage players to check the point system in advance so they can choose the right pace of play and the most comfortable stake level. This structure makes tournament play easy to follow and gives players a real opportunity to compete for extra rewards on top of regular gameplay.


Useful Tournament Information

  • • Entry is typically available through the promotion page or automatically through qualifying games.
  • • Points may be awarded based on bets, spins, timed activity, or event-specific mission completion.
  • • Leaderboard positions can usually be tracked in real time or through regular score updates.
  • • The higher the leaderboard position, the stronger the prize potential.
  • • Rewards are often credited automatically after the event ends or after results are finalized.
  • • Completed account verification may be required before larger rewards are released.
  • • Before joining, it is best to check the minimum qualifying stake, the list of eligible games, and the event duration.
  • • Smart bankroll management helps maintain steady momentum and improves the chance of staying competitive for top places.

items.title: Do we offer demo mode?
items.answer: Yes, selected games are available in demo mode so players can explore mechanics, features, and pacing before switching to full play.

items.title: How does registration work?
items.answer: Registration takes only a few simple steps: create an account, complete the main details, confirm the profile, and enter the casino through your personal account.

items.title: When can verification be required?
items.answer: Verification may be needed to confirm identity, age, address, and payment ownership, especially before withdrawals or during security checks.

items.title: Can I use several bonuses at the same time?
items.answer: Usually, one bonus balance or one active bonus offer is used at a time so that gameplay and bonus progress remain clear and transparent.
